value_chain_position: Cybersecurity platform layer — sells a unified SASE/CNAPP/SOC platform that secures every AI workload, cloud environment, and enterprise network; the security toll-taker that AI infrastructure cannot bypass.
relative_comps: PANW leads the cybersecurity platform consolidation thesis with $10.6B revenue, 19% YoY growth, and 40% FCF margins — among the strongest unit economics in large-cap security. It competes most directly with CRWD (faster-growing, purer endpoint play) and FTNT (better margins, more SMB). PANW's platformization strategy — offering free modules to force consolidation onto its stack — risks near-term billings deceleration for long-term wallet expansion. At ~17x revenue vs CRWD's ~32x, PANW is the more defensible valuation but lower-growth compounder.
